requirements.summary: Debug and fix the issue preventing users from advancing through quiz questions when attempting to submit answers
acceptanceCriteria: Users can successfully select an answer and progress to the next question
The 'Next' or submit button responds to clicks without errors
Question progression works for both authenticated and anonymous users
All quiz questions can be completed and the results page is reached

file_operations.description: Fix the question progression logic by ensuring answer selection state is properly managed and the next question navigation is triggered correctly. Verify that the handleAnswer and handleNext functions correctly update currentQuestionIndex and selectedAnswer state, and that button click events are not being prevented. Ensure the questions array is properly loaded from the backend or fallback questions before rendering.

Verify that the QuizQuestion component correctly handles radio button selection events and properly calls the onAnswerSelect callback with the selected answer index. Ensure no event propagation issues or disabled states are blocking user interaction with the answer options.

requirements.summary: Verify the quiz submission logic correctly sends data to the backend when authenticated and to localStorage when anonymous
acceptanceCriteria: Authenticated users' quiz submissions successfully reach the backend
Anonymous users' results are correctly stored in localStorage
No console errors occur during the submission process
The results page displays the submitted answers correctly

file_operations.description: Review and fix the quiz submission logic in the handleSubmit function to ensure authenticated users' answers are properly sent to the backend via the submitAnswers mutation, and anonymous users' results are correctly stored in localStorage with the proper data structure. Add error handling and console logging to diagnose any submission failures. Verify that the navigation to the results page occurs after successful submission.

Verify that the ResultsPage correctly retrieves quiz data from localStorage with the expected key and data structure. Ensure the score calculation logic handles the retrieved data properly and displays accurate results. Add fallback handling for cases where localStorage data is missing or malformed.
